Interface JsonMapNode

All Superinterfaces:
JsonBaseNode, JsonPart, Map<String,Object>
All Known Implementing Classes:
JsonConcurrentMap, JsonConcurrentSkipListMap, JsonLinkedMap, JsonMap
public sealed interface JsonMapNode extends JsonBaseNode, Map<String,Object> permits JsonConcurrentMap, JsonConcurrentSkipListMap, JsonLinkedMap, JsonMap
Since:
12.0.4

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface Map

    Map.Entry<K,V>

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default <T,U> T
    convertTo(Supplier<T> jsonObjectSupplier, TriConsumer<T,String,Object> putOperation, Supplier<U> jsonArraySupplier, BiConsumer<U,Object> addOperation, boolean parseJsonValue)
    class CustomJsonMap extends JsonMap { } class CustomList extends JsonList { } JsonMap jsonMap = new JsonMap(); jsonMap.put("number", new JsonValue("14", JsonValueType.NUMBER)); jsonMap.put("string", "string value"); jsonMap.put("bool", true); jsonMap.put("fornull1", JsonValue.NULL); jsonMap.put("fornull2", null); JsonList jsonList = new JsonList(); jsonList.add("one"); jsonList.add("two"); jsonMap.put("jsonList", jsonList); CustomJsonMap convertedObject = jsonMap.convertTo( CustomJsonMap::new, CustomJsonMap::put, CustomList::new, CustomList::add, true);

  • Method Details

    • getValueAsString

      default String getValueAsString(String key)
      Parameters:
      key - the key to get value.
      Returns:
      the string value or null.
      Since:
      12.0.4

    • getValueAsString

      default String getValueAsString(String key, boolean decodeUnicodeCharsSequence)
      Parameters:
      key - the key to get value.
      decodeUnicodeCharsSequence - true to decode the Unicode chars sequences like \u2122 to Java chars or false to use as it is.
      Returns:
      the string value or null.
      Since:
      12.0.11

    • getValueAsBoolean

      default Boolean getValueAsBoolean(String key)
      Parameters:
      key - the key to get value.
      Returns:
      the Boolean value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not parsable to Boolean.
      Since:
      12.0.11

    • getValueAsShort

      default Short getValueAsShort(String key)
      Parameters:
      key - the key to get value.
      Returns:
      the Short value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not parsable to Short.
      Since:
      12.0.12

    • getValueAsInteger

      default Integer getValueAsInteger(String key)
      Parameters:
      key - the key to get value.
      Returns:
      the Integer value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not parsable to integer.
      Since:
      12.0.4

    • getValueAsLong

      default Long getValueAsLong(String key)
      Parameters:
      key - the key to get value.
      Returns:
      the Long value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not parsable to Long.
      Since:
      12.0.4

    • getValueAsDouble

      default Double getValueAsDouble(String key)
      Parameters:
      key - the key to get value.
      Returns:
      the Double value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not parsable to Double.
      Since:
      12.0.4

    • getValueAsBigInteger

      default BigInteger getValueAsBigInteger(String key)
      Parameters:
      key - the key to get value.
      Returns:
      the BigInteger value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not parsable to BigInteger.
      Since:
      12.0.4

    • getValueAsBigDecimal

      default BigDecimal getValueAsBigDecimal(String key)
      Parameters:
      key - the key to get value.
      Returns:
      the BigDecimal value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not parsable to BigDecimal.
      Since:
      12.0.4

    • getValueAsJsonValue

      default JsonValue getValueAsJsonValue(String key)
      Parameters:
      key - the key to get value.
      Returns:
      the value as JsonValue object.
      Throws:
      InvalidValueException - if the value is not suitable to create an object of JsonValue.
      Since:
      12.0.11

    • getValueAsJsonBaseNode

      default JsonBaseNode getValueAsJsonBaseNode(String key)
      Parameters:
      key - the key to get value.
      Returns:
      the JsonBaseNode value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not an instance of JsonBaseNode.
      Since:
      12.0.11

    • getValueAsJsonListNode

      default JsonListNode getValueAsJsonListNode(String key)
      Parameters:
      key - the key to get value.
      Returns:
      the JsonListNode value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not an instance of JsonListNode.
      Since:
      12.0.4

    • getValueAsJsonMapNode

      default JsonMapNode getValueAsJsonMapNode(String key)
      Parameters:
      key - the key to get value.
      Returns:
      the JsonMapNode value or null. It will throw exception if the value is not an instance of JsonMapNode.
      Since:
      12.0.4

    • toJsonString

      default String toJsonString()
      Specified by:
      toJsonString in interface JsonBaseNode
      Specified by:
      toJsonString in interface JsonPart
      Returns:
      the JSON object string.
      Since:
      12.0.4

    • toOutputStream

      default void toOutputStream(OutputStream outputStream, Charset charset, boolean flushOnWrite) throws IOException
      Specified by:
      toOutputStream in interface JsonBaseNode
      Parameters:
      outputStream - the OutputStream to write the json.
      charset - the charset
      flushOnWrite - true to flush after each write operation otherwise false.
      Throws:
      IOException - if writing to OutputStream throws an exception.
      Since:
      12.0.9

    • toBigJsonString

      default String toBigJsonString()
      It internally utilizes parallel stream to build json string. The order of json object entries will be unpredictable but the json array will maintain its values order.
      Specified by:
      toBigJsonString in interface JsonBaseNode
      Returns:
      the JSON object string.
      Since:
      12.0.4

    • toWffBMObject

      default WffBMObject toWffBMObject()
      Returns:
      the WffBMObject.
      Since:
      12.0.4

    • convertTo

      default <T,U> T convertTo(Supplier<T> jsonObjectSupplier, TriConsumer<T,String,Object> putOperation, Supplier<U> jsonArraySupplier, BiConsumer<U,Object> addOperation, boolean parseJsonValue)
              class CustomJsonMap extends JsonMap {
        }
        class CustomList extends JsonList {
        }

        JsonMap jsonMap = new  JsonMap();
        jsonMap.put("number", new JsonValue("14", JsonValueType.NUMBER));
        jsonMap.put("string", "string value");
        jsonMap.put("bool", true);
        jsonMap.put("fornull1", JsonValue.NULL);
        jsonMap.put("fornull2", null);

        JsonList jsonList = new JsonList();
        jsonList.add("one");
        jsonList.add("two");
        jsonMap.put("jsonList", jsonList);

        CustomJsonMap convertedObject = jsonMap.convertTo(
        CustomJsonMap::new, CustomJsonMap::put, CustomList::new, CustomList::add, true);
      Type Parameters:
      T - the JSON object class type. It is the return type of the method.
      U - the JSON array class type.
      Parameters:
      jsonObjectSupplier - the supplier to provide new JSON object.
      putOperation - the TriConsumer of the supplied JSON object, the key and value.
      jsonArraySupplier - the supplier to provide new JSON array.
      addOperation - the BiConsumer of the supplied JSON array and value.
      parseJsonValue - true to parse the JsonValue to appropriate value types if the underlying value is a JsonValue object.
      Returns:
      the converted object.
      Since:
      12.0.11
